nasb.text: “Behold, days are coming,” declares the Lord, “when the city will be rebuilt for the Lord from the Tower of Hananel to the Corner Gate.

esv.text: “Behold, the days are coming, declares the Lord, when the city shall be rebuilt for the Lord  from the Tower of Hananel to the Corner Gate.

cnv.text: “看哪！日子快到，這城從哈楠業城樓直到角門，必為耶和華重建起來。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“看啊，时候将到，从哈楠业楼直到角门，整个耶路撒冷城要重建起来归给耶和华。
